legalBasis: Pension Reform Act (PRA) 2014, Section 4(1) — Contributory Pension Scheme minimum rates

pensionableEarnings.legalBasis: PRA 2014, Section 4(3) — Pensionable earnings comprise basic salary, housing allowance, and transport allowance

remittance.description: 7 working days after salary payment date, skipping weekends and Nigerian public holidays
remittance.legalBasis: PRA 2014, Section 11(3)(b) — Employer shall remit contributions within 7 working days
